description:
Debug Axes is a ProtoFlux node that when called will make a 3 arrows visual similar to a Gizmo at the global coordinates with the arrows having the length provided and will appear for a duration in seconds. The visual will appear under the Root of a world. In most cases, the debug visuals will be drawn over most materials, letting you see them easily.

See also: Coordinate spaces

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to spawn a debug axes visual in the root of the world with the provided parameters.
fields.Position: The position in global space for the debug visual. Default at the node.
fields.Rotation: The Rotation in global space for the debug visual. Default at the node.
fields.Length: The length of the arrows for the debug visual in meters.
fields.RightColor: The color for the debug axes in the (1,0,0) direction. Also known as the red arrow on a Gizmo. Defaults to red.
fields.UpColor: The color for the debug axes in the (0,1,0) direction. Also known as the green arrow on a Gizmo. Defaults to green.
fields.ForwardColor: The color for the debug axes in the (0,0,1) direction. Also known as the blue arrow on a Gizmo. Defaults to blue.
fields.Duration: How long the debug axes visual appears for in seconds.
fields.Next: Fires after * (Call) is impulsed and the gizmo was created successfully.
